DYNAMIC.name: Dynamic Entry
DYNAMIC.desc: Speed & Aggression. High risk, high reward.

DELIBERATE.name: Deliberate Clear
DELIBERATE.desc: Slow & Methodical. Maximizes safety and precision.

VETERAN.name: Veteran
VETERAN.desc: Immune to panic. +10 Discipline under high stress.

MEDIC.name: Medic
MEDIC.desc: Heals a wounded teammate for 10 HP after mission.

LEADBYEXAMPLE.name: Lead by Example
LEADBYEXAMPLE.desc: Nearby operators gain +5 to all stats.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-001: SUNDAY DINNER
MISSIONS.brief: Domestic disturbance escalated. Suspect armed (knife). Civilians present. Low-Light conditions.

intervention.prompt: A child is standing in the hallway, frozen in fear. Suspect is yelling from the kitchen.
Suspect is pushing furniture against the kitchen door. You hear a second voice inside.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-007: MIDNIGHT PHARMACY
MISSIONS.brief: Armed robbery in progress at 24h pharmacy. Two suspects, one confirmed firearm. Security guard wounded.

intervention.prompt: HOSTAGE IN LINE OF FIRE. Suspect is using civilian as shield.
Second suspect heard racking a shotgun behind the stockroom door.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-015: THE CELLAR
MISSIONS.brief: Suspected meth lab in residential basement. Unknown number of hostiles. Hazmat risk. Extremely confined.

intervention.prompt: Strong chemical smell. Team has limited gas mask supply — only enough for one safe pass.
SUSPECT FLEEING through narrow tunnel. Risk of booby traps.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-022: IRON GATE
MISSIONS.brief: Weapons cache located in abandoned warehouse. Intel suggests 4-6 armed hostiles. Possible IED threat.

intervention.prompt: Pointman spots a tripwire across the corridor. Could be connected to IED or alarm.
CONTACTS ON CATWALK. They have elevation advantage.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-031: BLACK TITHE
MISSIONS.brief: Bomb threat at public event. 200+ civilians. Suspect barricaded in bell tower with detonator. Sniper authorized.

intervention.prompt: Civilians are stampeding toward the exit, blocking your team's path to the bell tower.
SUSPECT ON RADIO: "One more step and this whole place goes." Detonator confirmed in hand.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-003: SILENT ALARM
MISSIONS.brief: Bank alarm tripped after hours. Thermal shows 3 figures inside. Vault door breached. Likely professional crew.

intervention.prompt: Night guard found zip-tied and unconscious. He's breathing but needs medical attention.
You hear drilling from the vault room. If they finish, the evidence is gone.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-009: OVERPASS
MISSIONS.brief: Man on bridge threatening to jump. Has a firearm. Traffic stopped. Negotiator requested backup.

intervention.prompt: Subject points firearm at approaching officers. He's screaming incoherently.
Subject drops weapon but moves toward railing. He's going to jump.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-012: POOL HALL
MISSIONS.brief: Shots fired at pool hall. Gang-related. Multiple wounded. Shooters still inside. 15-20 patrons trapped.

intervention.prompt: Civilian with gunshot wound crawling toward door. Shooters have line of sight to entrance.
Shooter 2 grabs a patron and puts gun to their head. "Back off or I drop him!"

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-018: SCHOOLYARD
MISSIONS.brief: Disgruntled former employee. Building evacuated but 2 staff members unaccounted for. Subject armed with rifle.

intervention.prompt: Muffled crying from supply closet. Could be trapped staff — or a trap.

choices.text: Cover from distance, ask them to come out (Aim)

intervention.prompt: Subject firing from behind stage curtains. Large open space with minimal cover.
Second missing staff member found in hallway, wounded. Subject may double back.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-025: HOTEL NEON
MISSIONS.brief: VIP protection detail gone wrong. Client barricaded. Former bodyguard turned hostile. Elevator access only.

intervention.prompt: Elevator is the only quick route to floor 14. Stairs take 8 minutes. Suspect may harm VIP.
Suspect on phone: demands helicopter in 10 minutes or VIP dies. Sounds agitated.

choices.text: Sniper through window from adjacent building (Aim)

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-028: TRAINYARD
MISSIONS.brief: Drug trafficking bust. Intel: armed guards in cargo containers. K-9 unit detected explosives. Night operation.

intervention.prompt: Guard dog barking at your position. Handler will investigate in seconds.
Container #7 has visible wiring on the handle. Could be an alarm or worse.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-033: RED CARPET
MISSIONS.brief: Assassination threat at mayor's fundraiser. 300+ attendees. Suspect in crowd, armed. Undercover insertion required.

intervention.prompt: Man matching suspect description near bar. Reaching into jacket pocket.

phases.text: False alarm — real suspect identified on balcony

intervention.prompt: Radio: actual suspect located on second-floor balcony overlooking stage. Mayor about to speak.
Suspect reveals vest. "I let go of this button, we all go." Dead man's switch confirmed.

choices.text: Keep him talking, EOD en route (Discipline)

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-037: CARGO SHIP
MISSIONS.brief: Human trafficking operation. Containers on anchored cargo ship. Coast Guard requests tactical support. Tight corridors below deck.

intervention.prompt: A crew member is on deck smoking. Could be a lookout or innocent sailor.

choices.text: Cover from hiding, let him leave (Aim)

intervention.prompt: Sounds of machinery and screaming below deck. They're destroying evidence — or worse.

phases.text: Captain threatens to sink the ship

intervention.prompt: Captain at engine room controls: "I'll scuttle this ship before I let you take me!"

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-005: CORNER STORE
MISSIONS.brief: Silent alarm. Single suspect with handgun. One clerk inside. Suspect appears under the influence.

intervention.prompt: Suspect is visible through front window, waving gun erratically. Clerk is behind counter.

choices.text: Cover from outside, wait for opening (Aim)

intervention.prompt: Suspect is barely standing. Gun is pointed at the floor but he could raise it at any moment.

MISSIONS.title: CASE #2024-040: UNDERGROUND
MISSIONS.brief: Multiple IEDs planted on metro platforms. Two suspects identified on CCTV. Station partially evacuated. Trains halted.

phases.text: First IED located on Platform A

intervention.prompt: Device found strapped to support column. Timer reads 12:00 and counting.

choices.text: Mark and relay to EOD, establish perimeter (Aim)

intervention.prompt: Suspect 1 is actively wiring a device to the tracks on Platform B. He hasn't seen you.

phases.text: Suspect 2 Opens Fire from Ticket Hall

intervention.prompt: Third device found ON THE TRACKS. A service train is inbound. 90 seconds to impact.

choices.text: Radio control room to halt train (Reflexes)
Precision shot at device from platform (Aim)
